'''''Machines of War''''' was the fourth [[Hasbro]]/[[Toys "R" Us]]–exclusive [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] published in [[2002]].

==Plot summary==
During the opening stages of the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] jumps on board a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|Republic Gunship]]. When the crew comes under attack by [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]], the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone-trooper]] crew uses a grappling hook to grab one and slam it against another. They then continue the fight, but Yoda is afraid for the future.
